note: Per-skill index: for each observed skill/ability, lists every talent that modifies it, where it sits in the tree, its parsed stat modification, and a mock value showing that modification applied to a normalized baseline of 10. Each modifying talent is tagged with one or more lanes from laneTaxonomy (DMG/CRIT/CDR/CAST/HASTE/SPEED/HEAL/SHIELD/MITIGATION/RESOURCE/COST/DURATION/AOE/CC/ARMOR/SUMMON/MISC), plus cross-cutting behavior flags (PROC, STACK) that describe how the effect triggers rather than what stat it touches. A handful of nodes have unresolved "$xx" template descriptions in the source export - these are flagged rather than guessed at.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Adaptations by 20%.

Adrenaline Rush.baseDescription:
Surge with vitality, dispeling all harmful effects from yourself and increasing your movement speed by 40% for 10 seconds.

Usable while stealthed.

modifyingTalents.description: Your Adrenaline Rush now incurs a -90% reduced cooldown when used while Elude is active.
Reduces the cooldown of Adrenaline Rush by -30 sec.
Reduces the Focus cost Adrenaline Rush by -50% and increases the movement speed granted by 20%.

Precisely shoot an enemy from a great distance, inflicting 24 + 48.5% ranged AP Physical damage.

Damage increased by 25% for each stack of Advantage.

Usable while in Elude.
Consuming Advantage now has a 20% chance per Archery Point spent to refund 20 Focus.

Fire a shot that ricochets between 3 enemies, dealing Ranged Weapon Damage plus 6 to each enemy.

Generates 1 stack of Advantage for each enemy hit.

Increases your critical strike chance by 15% and reduces your Focus costs by -25%.

Lasts 4 sec for each stack of Advantage.

Shoot at an enemy's throat with a toxin-laced arrow, dealing 25 + 36.07% ranged AP Nature damage and silencing them for 1 seconds.

Duration increased by 1 sec per stack of Advantage.
Abilities used with 5 stacks of Advantage now refresh the duration of your active Skirmish by 5 sec.
Critical strikes with Quick Shot now generate an additional stack of Advantage.

Shoot a burning arrow dealing 791 + 35% ranged AP + 45% fire SP Fire damage to an enemy and up to 5 enemies within 6 yds, and causing your next 3 direct damage Advantage spenders to deal 50% of their damage to nearby enemies.

Direct damage increased by 20% for each stack of Advantage.

Level 50 Passive
Adds 25% to the bonuses that your stacks of Advantage provide.

Level 10 Passive
Your Wild Strike now generates 1 additional Advantage.

Removes the minimum range of your ranged abilities.

Assault a low health enemy, dealing 100% Weapon Damage (175% with a dagger equipped) plus an additional 8 + 100% AP Physical damage. If the target is bleeding, this deals 50% increased damage.

Damage increased by 30% for each stack of Advantage.

Only usable on enemies below 20% health.

For 4 seconds, your melee auto attacks deal an additional 30% (doubled with a dagger equipped) of the damage dealt as Nature damage and reduces your target's healing received by -20% for 8 seconds, stacking 2 times.

Duration increased by 4 sec for each stack of Advantage.

Usable while in Elude.
Damage dealt by Flank and Rusty Shiv now increases the target's damage taken from your Advantage spenders by 25% for 8 seconds.

Launch a hook at a target attempting to lodge it into an open wound, dealing 66 + 100% AP Physical damage. 

If the target is bleeding, you can reactivate this to pull yourself to them, dealing 150% Weapon Damage and generating 2 Advantage

Level 30 Passive
Each stack of Advantage spent now gives you a 20% chance to refund 1 stack of Advantage.

Launch darts at up to 5 nearby enemies, dealing 15 + 30% AP Ranged Physical damage.

Deals 50% additional damage and strikes 1 additional target for each stack of Advantage.
Your Skullpiercer used with 5 stacks of Advantage now extends the duration of Dirty Blades by 6 sec.

Shoot a powerful arrow that deals Weapon Damage plus 40 and stuns the target for 1 seconds. 

Duration increased by 1 sec per stack of Advantage.
Your Woodland Adept now triggers a -10% reduced cooldown for each stack of Advantage active when cast.
Entering Elude generates 1 stack of Advantage and 10 Focus every 5 sec for 30 seconds.

Instantly generates 5 stacks of Advantage and allows you see nearby stealthed enemies for 5 seconds.

Usable while stealthed.
You now have a -20% chance to not consume Advantage on cast.
Your senses heighten, causing you to instantly generate 5 Advantage and allowing the use of abilities that require Elude for 15 seconds.

Shoot a magical arrow, dealing 38 + 35% ranged AP Physical damage and reducing the cooldown of active Horn spells by -15 sec.

Damage increased by 30% for each stack of Advantage.

Set up a powerful magical arrow and then shoot it, dealing 10 + 20% ranged AP Nature damage to the target, increased by 30% for each stack of Advantage.

Creates an enchanted flare on the ground, causing nearby enemies to take 224 + 20% ranged AP Nature damage every 2 sec, lasting 2 sec for each stack of Advantage.
Your Skullpiercers or Emerald Arrows used with 5 stacks of Advantage now reduce the cooldown of Woodland Arrow by -5 sec.

Casting Toxic Dart and abilities that spend stacks of Advantage now have a 20% chance to spawn a green Dreamflower at a random location nearby within 15 yds of you.Dream Flower (Spawner)When an ally runs over the flower, they consume it to heal for 3% maximum health and gain 40% increased movement speed for 5 seconds.
Your Skullpiercers and Woodland Arrows used with 5 stacks of Advantage now restore 3% Focus and summon a War Falcon for 6 seconds.
Critical strikes with Quick Shot or Falconstrike now reduce the cast time and cost of your next ability that consumes Advantage by -34% for 15 seconds, stacking 3 times.

Launch an arrow with magical vines attached to it at your target, dealing 78 + 33% ranged AP Nature damage and rooting them for 40 seconds (8 sec vs players). Damage caused may interrupt the effect.

Hits 1 additional nearby target per stack of Advantage.
Consuming Advantage now has a 20% chance per Archery Point spent to refund 20 Focus.
Increases the critical strike chance of Wild Strike and Assault by 5%.

Casting Instinct now also restores 40 extra Focus and guarantees your next 3 Skullpiercers or Assaults within 20 seconds to critically strike.

In addition, Instinct now grants you an additional 10% of your Agility as melee attack power.
Increases the range of your ranged abilities and Auto Shot by 5 yds.
Damage dealt by Auto Shot now restores 4 Focus.

Banditry.baseDescription: Increases your critical strike chance by 4% and Focus regeneration by 30%.

Battle Prowess.baseDescription:
Increases chance to hit with all spells and attacks by 1% for you and party and raid members.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Battle Screech.baseDescription:
Empower party and raid members within 40 yds, increasing their attack or spell power by 65 for 15 seconds.

Does not stack with similar effects.

modifyingTalents.description: Falconstrike and Battle Screech now increase your movement speed by 30% for 3 seconds.
Increases the duration of Battle Screech and reduces the cooldown of Snapseed by 5 sec.

Beatdown.baseDescription:
Level 20 Passive
Auto attacks now have a 5% chance to reveal a fault in the enemy's defenses, causing your next instance of Physical ability damage to ignore Armor.

Chance increased by 15% while wielding a polearm.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the Focus cost of Flank, Blackjack, and Wild Strike by -10%.

Blur.baseDescription: Increases your chance to dodge and parry by 4%.

Boots of Elvenkind.baseDescription: Increases your Agility by 5% and reduces the duration of movement slowing effects on you by -20%.

Briar Veil.baseDescription: Thorns and leaves swirl around you, masking your movements for 10 seconds, increasing your dodge chance by 50% and causing dodging attacks to restore 2% maximum health and 5 Focus.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the dodge chance provided by Briar Veil by 25%.
Reduces the cast time of your Bushcraft abilities by -50%.
Reduces the cooldown of Bushcraft Glider by -30 sec.
Knockout and Bushwhack now increases your damage dealt against the target by 10% for 5 seconds.

Close Quarters.baseDescription: Increases your attack power and Agility by 6%.

Crippling Shot.baseDescription: Fire a crippling shot at an enemy slowing movement speed by -50% and knocking them off their mounts, making them unable to mount again for 5 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the cooldown of Crippling Shot by -4 sec.
Increases the duration of Knockout and Crippling Shot by 1 sec.
Reduces the cooldown of Crippling Shot and Snapseed by -20%.
Reduces the cooldown of Cutthroat by -15 sec, but reduces the range of Cutthroat by -10 yds.

Dastardly.baseDescription:
Level 50 Passive
Increases your critical damage dealt by 15% on enemies above 80% health or below 20% health.

Deadshot.baseDescription:
Generates 2 Advantage
Shoot a powerful arrow at the target dealing 250% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 20.1.

Only usable on enemies below 20% health.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the damage of Deadshot by 75%.
Direct Physical damage dealt now has an 8% chance to allow you to use Deadshot regardless of the targets health for 8 seconds.

Defense of the Ancients.baseDescription:
You now emanate an aura around you, increasing the Armor of party and raid members by 390.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Deft Hands.baseDescription: Increases your melee and ranged haste by 5%.

Devastating Shots.baseDescription: Increases your critical strike chance by 4% and your hit chance by 2%.

modifyingTalents.description: Adds 10% to the damage dealt by Dirty Blades and causes its damage dealt to heal you equal to 50% of the value.
Your Skullpiercer used with 5 stacks of Advantage now extends the duration of Dirty Blades by 6 sec.

Double The Pace.baseDescription:
Increases all party and raid member's melee and ranged haste by 10%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, increases your critical strike chance by 2%.

modifyingTalents.description: Using a Horn now summons a Dragonhawk to assist you in combat for 15 seconds.
Reduces all damage taken by -2% for each War Falcon or Dragonhawk you have active.
Increases your Physical and Nature damage dealt by 1% for each War Falcon or Dragonhawk you have active.
Damage dealt by War Falcons and Dragonhawks now has a 15% chance to reduce the enemy's resistances by 75 and increase their Magic damage taken by -2% for 15 seconds.
Your War Falcons and Dragonhawks now have a 25% chance to deal additional Physical damage to 3 nearby enemies.

Your War Falcons and Dragonhawks now grant you a stack of Coordination when they deal damage.
Coordination (Proc)Increases your critical strike chance and critical damage by 1% for 15 seconds, stacking 10 times.

Level 10 Passive
Your damaging critical strikes now spawn a green Dream Flower at a random location within 15 yds of you. Dream Flower (Spawner)When an ally runs over the flower, they consume it to heal for 3% maximum health and gain 40% increased movement speed for 5 seconds.Can only occur once per sec.

Casting Toxic Dart and abilities that spend stacks of Advantage now have a 20% chance to spawn a green Dreamflower at a random location nearby within 15 yds of you.Dream Flower (Spawner)When an ally runs over the flower, they consume it to heal for 3% maximum health and gain 40% increased movement speed for 5 seconds.

Each time you spawn a green Dreamflower you are granted 1 stack of Highlander.Highlander (Stacks)At 3 stacks, your next Falconstrike within 10 seconds deals 25% increased damage and reduces the enemy's healing received by -40% for 8 seconds.

Reduces the cooldown of Elude and Knockout by -4 sec.

For 4 seconds, your melee auto attacks deal an additional 30% (doubled with a dagger equipped) of the damage dealt as Nature damage and reduces your target's healing received by -20% for 8 seconds, stacking 2 times.

Duration increased by 4 sec for each stack of Advantage.

Usable while in Elude.
While you have daggers equipped, direct critical strikes on enemies below 35% health now have a chance to allow the use of abilities as if you were in Elude for 5 sec.

Teleport to an enemy, summon a decoy beneath them, and mark them for 8 seconds. Dealing melee damage to them adds a stack to this effect, up to 20 stacks.

Reactivating this ability within 8 seconds deals 1 + 55% AP Physical damage to your target, increased by 20% for each stack on the target, and then teleports you back to your decoy.

Usable while in Elude.

Knock an enemy out, incapacitating them for 4 seconds and removing bleed and poison effects from them. Damage caused will interrupt this effect.

Usable while in Elude.
Increases your damage dealt by 10% for 12 seconds after leaving Elude.
Slip into the shadows, entering an improved stealth mode, increases your movement speed by 25% for 10 seconds, and applies Elude.
Entering Elude generates 1 stack of Advantage and 10 Focus every 5 sec for 30 seconds.
While in Elude, your critical strike chance is now increased by 20%.
While in Elude, gain 20% increased movement speed and regenerate 3% maximum health every 3 sec.
Your senses heighten, causing you to instantly generate 5 Advantage and allowing the use of abilities that require Elude for 15 seconds.
Damage dealt by Woodland Arrow and Emerald Arrow now poison enemies for 3 seconds, dealing 91 + 10% ranged AP Nature damage every 1 sec.

Increases the critical strike chance of Falconstrike and Emerald Arrow by 15%.

In addition, critical strikes with Falconstrike now increase the damage of subsequent Falconstrikes by 5% for 15 seconds, stacking 5 times.
Your Skullpiercers or Emerald Arrows used with 5 stacks of Advantage now reduce the cooldown of Woodland Arrow by -5 sec.
Increases the tick rate of Toxic Dart and Emerald Arrows by -20%.

Emanate an aura for 15 seconds, causing allied players to deal 35% ranged AP additional damage as Stormstrike Damage when they deal direct damage.

Applies Exhaustion, preventing you from benefiting from similar effects for 1 minute.

Call down war falcons upon a targeted area, slowing up to 8 enemies within the area by -60% for 5 seconds.

A Falcon is summoned for each enemy affected for 12 seconds.
Reduces the cooldowns of Falcon's Call by -30 sec.
Removes the Focus cost of Falcon's Call, allows it to strike 2 additional targets, and increases its range by 10 yds.
Falconstrike and Battle Screech now increase your movement speed by 30% for 3 seconds.

Each time you spawn a green Dreamflower you are granted 1 stack of Highlander.Highlander (Stacks)At 3 stacks, your next Falconstrike within 10 seconds deals 25% increased damage and reduces the enemy's healing received by -40% for 8 seconds.
Critical strikes with Quick Shot or Falconstrike now reduce the cast time and cost of your next ability that consumes Advantage by -34% for 15 seconds, stacking 3 times.

Increases the critical strike chance of Falconstrike and Emerald Arrow by 15%.

In addition, critical strikes with Falconstrike now increase the damage of subsequent Falconstrikes by 5% for 15 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Increases the critical strike chance of Falconstrike and Emerald Arrow by 15%.

In addition, critical strikes with Falconstrike now increase the damage of subsequent Falconstrikes by 5% for 15 seconds, stacking 5 times.
Damage dealt by Flank and Rusty Shiv now increases the target's damage taken from your Advantage spenders by 25% for 8 seconds.
Increases the damage of Skullpiercer and Flank by 20%, plus an additional 35% if you have a polearm equipped.
Reduces the Focus cost of Flank, Blackjack, and Wild Strike by -10%.
Increases the chance for Flank to critically strike by 50% and increases your chance to resist root effects by 25%.
Increases the critical damage of Flank by 10%.

Freedom.baseDescription: Free up to 10 nearby allies within 15 yds of you for 8 seconds, causing them to become immune to roots and snares, and allowing their critical strikes to increase their movement speed by 30% for 5 seconds.

Frenzy.baseDescription:
Enrage all nearby allies, increasing their haste by 30% for 20 seconds.

After being affected by this spell, allies cannot benefit from similar effects for 5 minutes.

Grace.baseDescription: Increases your Agility and movement speed by 10%.

Guile of the Cutthroat.baseDescription:
Increases party and raid member's melee and ranged attack power by 5%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, increases your damage dealt by 3%.

Highwayman.baseDescription: Direct critical strikes while behind your target increase your haste by 15% for 5 seconds, or for your next 2 attacks.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the cooldown of Horn spells by -50%.

Shoot a magical arrow, dealing 38 + 35% ranged AP Physical damage and reducing the cooldown of active Horn spells by -15 sec.

Damage increased by 30% for each stack of Advantage.
Using a Horn now summons a Dragonhawk to assist you in combat for 15 seconds.

Horn of Alacrity.baseDescription:
Generates 1 Advantage
Emanate an aura for 30 seconds that grants 5% increased haste to party and raid members. Does not stack with similar effects.

While active, you generate 3 Focus every 1 sec.

Horn of War.baseDescription:
Generates 1 Advantage
Emanate an aura for 30 seconds that grants 5% increased critical strike chance to party and raid members. Does not stack with similar effects.

While active, you generate 3 Focus every 1 sec.

modifyingTalents.description: Your Hunting Shot now deals 25% increased damage for each subsequent target it ricochets to.

You now fire an arrow every 3 sec at enemies within 30 yds affected by your Hunting Shot, dealing 75% Ranged Weapon Damage.

Scales with Hunting Shot modifiers.
Increases the effectiveness of Instinct by 25%.

Casting Instinct now also restores 40 extra Focus and guarantees your next 3 Skullpiercers or Assaults within 20 seconds to critically strike.

In addition, Instinct now grants you an additional 10% of your Agility as melee attack power.
Your Instinct now additionally increases your critical strike rating by 20% of your Agility.
Reduces the cooldown of Elude and Knockout by -4 sec.
Increases the duration of Knockout and Crippling Shot by 1 sec.
Knockout and Bushwhack now increases your damage dealt against the target by 10% for 5 seconds.

Knuckleduster.baseDescription: Periodic damage dealt now generates 5 Focus.

Lethal Wounds.baseDescription: Increases the tick rate of your periodic damage effects by -20%.

Natural Disguise.baseDescription: Instantly dispels all movement slowing effects from allies within 30 yds and transforms them into a bush, stealthing them for 20 seconds.

Nimble.baseDescription:
Level 30 Passive
Increases your ranged haste by 20% of your Agility.

Pinpoint Accuracy.baseDescription: Critical strikes with direct damaging abilities now generate 4 Focus.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases your damage against bleeding or Poisoned targets by 10%.
Your ranged abilities against Poisoned targets now ignores 25% of enemy armor.
Damage dealt by Skullpiercer is increased by 30% against Poisoned targets.
Damage dealt by Precision Shot now increases enemy Physical damage taken by 4% for 10 seconds.
Increases the critical strike chance of Precision Shot by 50% on enemies above 80% health.
Increases the damage of Skullpiercer and Precision Shot by 20%.
Increases the damage of Precision Shot by 20% when used from 40 yds or further away from your target.
While in Elude, gain a stack of Masterful Archery every 2 sec.Masterful Archery (Aura)Your next Precision Shot now deals 10% increased damage for 10 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.
Critical strikes with Skullpiercer and Precision Shot cause the enemy to bleed for an additional 50% damage of the damage dealt over 4 seconds.
Periodic damage dealt with Serrated Shot and Toxic Dart now increases the damage of your next Precision Shot within 8 seconds by 10%, stacking 10 times.
Increases the ranged weapon damage dealt by Quick Shot by 20%.
Critical strikes with Quick Shot now generate an additional stack of Advantage.
Critical strikes with Quick Shot or Falconstrike now reduce the cast time and cost of your next ability that consumes Advantage by -34% for 15 seconds, stacking 3 times.

Quick-Witted.baseDescription: Avoiding an attack now causes you to quickly stab an enemy with one of the arrows from your quiver, dealing 1 + 100% AP Physical damage and reducing their attack speed by -20% for 8 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description:
Damage dealt by Wild Strike and Quills will now tear into enemies, causing them to bleed for 78 Physical damage over 9 seconds, stacking 4 times.

Damage dealt by Quills now spreads your periodic effects to 5 enemies within 10 yds and extends their duration by 2 sec.
Increases the effectiveness of Quivers by 25%.

Rapid Strikes.baseDescription:
Melee and ranged auto attacks now have a 25% chance to strike an additional time for 50% of the damage dealt.

Can only occur once per sec.

Ravage.baseDescription:
Generates 1 Advantage
Ravage an enemy, causing them to bleed out dealing 112 + 23.72% AP Physical damage over 12 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the damage and duration of Toxic Dart and Ravage by 25%.

Level 40 Passive
Allows the periodic damage dealt by Ravage to critically strike.
Damage dealt by Flank and Rusty Shiv now increases the target's damage taken from your Advantage spenders by 25% for 8 seconds.
Increases the damage of Serrated Shot by 30%.
Auto shots now have a 20% chance to extend the duration of your Serrated Shot by 2 sec.

Level 40 Passive
Allows the periodic damage dealt by Serrated Shot to critically strike.
Periodic damage dealt with Serrated Shot and Toxic Dart now increases the damage of your next Precision Shot within 8 seconds by 10%, stacking 10 times.
Abilities used with 5 stacks of Advantage now refresh the duration of your active Skirmish by 5 sec.

Fire a volley of powerful shots that pierce through Armor, dealing 450% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 300 to all targets in a 40 yd line.

While Skirmish is active this ability is guaranteed to critically strike.
Increases the damage of Skullpiercer and Precision Shot by 20%.
Critical strikes with Skullpiercer and Precision Shot cause the enemy to bleed for an additional 50% damage of the damage dealt over 4 seconds.
Increases the damage of Skullpiercer and Flank by 20%, plus an additional 35% if you have a polearm equipped.
Increases the attack power scaling of Skullpiercer by 30%.
Your Skullpiercer used with 5 stacks of Advantage now extends the duration of Dirty Blades by 6 sec.
Damage dealt by Skullpiercer is increased by 30% against Poisoned targets.

Casting Instinct now also restores 40 extra Focus and guarantees your next 3 Skullpiercers or Assaults within 20 seconds to critically strike.

In addition, Instinct now grants you an additional 10% of your Agility as melee attack power.
Your Skullpiercers or Emerald Arrows used with 5 stacks of Advantage now reduce the cooldown of Woodland Arrow by -5 sec.
Your Skullpiercers and Woodland Arrows used with 5 stacks of Advantage now restore 3% Focus and summon a War Falcon for 6 seconds.

Snapseed.baseDescription: Toss a snapseed at an enemy, dealing 27 + 30% ranged AP Physical damage and knocking them back.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the cooldown of Crippling Shot and Snapseed by -20%.
Increases the duration of Battle Screech and reduces the cooldown of Snapseed by 5 sec.
Damage dealt by Snapseed now reduces the enemy's chance to hit by -15% for 10 seconds.

Snatch.baseDescription:
Snatch an enemy's melee weapons, disarming them for 4 seconds.

If you are disarmed, you also return your weapon to yourself.

modifyingTalents.description: Removes the Focus cost of Snatch.
Increases the range of Snatch by 15 yds.

Strike Where It Hurts.baseDescription: Your ability critical strikes now increase the damage the target takes from bleeds by 30% for 15 seconds.

Survival Potion.baseDescription: Drink a survival potion, dispelling all poison and disease effects and removing 1 poison and disease effect every 3 sec for 9 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Your Survival Potion now also heals you for 10% of your maximum health with each tick.
Reduces the cooldown of Survival Potion by -25%.

Thalassian Brand.baseDescription:
Mark an enemy for total destruction, increasing your allies ranged attack power against the target by 300 and dealing 1120 Nature damage every 3 sec for 15 seconds.

The marked target can always be seen by the Ranger whether it stealths or turns invisible

Throatpunch.baseDescription: Punch an enemy in the throat, interrupting the enemy's spellcast, preventing any spell from that school of magic from being cast for 2 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description:
Level 10 Passive
Increases the damage and tick rate of Toxic Dart by -30%, but reduces the duration of its damaging effect by -30%.
Periodic damage dealt with Serrated Shot and Toxic Dart now increases the damage of your next Precision Shot within 8 seconds by 10%, stacking 10 times.
Increases the damage and duration of Toxic Dart and Ravage by 25%.
Reduces the Focus cost of Toxic Dart by -15.

Casting Toxic Dart and abilities that spend stacks of Advantage now have a 20% chance to spawn a green Dreamflower at a random location nearby within 15 yds of you.Dream Flower (Spawner)When an ally runs over the flower, they consume it to heal for 3% maximum health and gain 40% increased movement speed for 5 seconds.
Increases the tick rate of Toxic Dart and Emerald Arrows by -20%.

Trueshot Lodge Training.baseDescription:
Increases your off-hand weapon damage by 50%.

While wielding a polearm, your Physical damage dealt is increased by 6%.

Viper's Bite.baseDescription:
Generates 2 Advantage
Unleash 4 quick strikes over 1 seconds to an enemy, each dealing 85% Weapon Damage.

If the target is bleeding, each strike deals an additional 400 + 25% AP Physical damage.

If the target is poisoned, each strike deals Nature damage instead of Physical damage.

modifyingTalents.description: Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor now summons a War Falcon to aid you in combat for 12 seconds. Can only occur once every 4 sec.
Reduces all damage taken by -2% for each War Falcon or Dragonhawk you have active.
Increases your Physical and Nature damage dealt by 1% for each War Falcon or Dragonhawk you have active.
Periodic damage dealt now has a 10% chance to summon a War Falcon to aid you in battle for 6 seconds.
Your Skullpiercers and Woodland Arrows used with 5 stacks of Advantage now restore 3% Focus and summon a War Falcon for 6 seconds.
Increases the duration of War Falcons by 3 sec.
Damage dealt by War Falcons and Dragonhawks now has a 15% chance to reduce the enemy's resistances by 75 and increase their Magic damage taken by -2% for 15 seconds.
Your War Falcons and Dragonhawks now have a 25% chance to deal additional Physical damage to 3 nearby enemies.

Your War Falcons and Dragonhawks now grant you a stack of Coordination when they deal damage.
Coordination (Proc)Increases your critical strike chance and critical damage by 1% for 15 seconds, stacking 10 times.
Increases the effectiveness of your Waterskins by 25%.
While a polearm is equipped, your chance to trigger your Weapon Crafts and their damage dealt is increased by 25%.

Level 10 Passive
Your Wild Strike now generates 1 additional Advantage.

Removes the minimum range of your ranged abilities.
Increases the critical strike chance of Wild Strike and Assault by 5%.
Your Wild Strike now strikes 2 additional nearby enemies, but deals reduced damage with each enemy struck.
Reduces the Focus cost of Flank, Blackjack, and Wild Strike by -10%.
While you have a polearm equipped, your Wild Strike now has a 15% chance to strike 3 additional times.

Damage dealt by Wild Strike and Quills will now tear into enemies, causing them to bleed for 78 Physical damage over 9 seconds, stacking 4 times.

Damage dealt by Quills now spreads your periodic effects to 5 enemies within 10 yds and extends their duration by 2 sec.

Windrunner's Reach.baseDescription:
Increases the range of your ranged abilities by 10 yds.

In addition, your critical strike chance against Undead, Beasts, and Dragonkin is increased by 4%.

modifyingTalents.description: Your Woodland Adept now triggers a -10% reduced cooldown for each stack of Advantage active when cast.
Damage dealt by Woodland Arrow and Emerald Arrow now poison enemies for 3 seconds, dealing 91 + 10% ranged AP Nature damage every 1 sec.
Your Skullpiercers or Emerald Arrows used with 5 stacks of Advantage now reduce the cooldown of Woodland Arrow by -5 sec.
Your Skullpiercers and Woodland Arrows used with 5 stacks of Advantage now restore 3% Focus and summon a War Falcon for 6 seconds.
